title: Create: Enhanced Mastery
description: Integration Layer between Create and Iron's Spells n' Spellbooks.
body:
Create: Enhanced Mastery is not only an integration layer between Create and Iron's Spells n' Spellbooks, but is also an addon to Iron's, intent on adding brand new content.

 

Currently, Create: Enhanced Mastery offers the addition of several recipes to add an automation layer to Iron's Spells n' Spellbooks.

- Create-based recipes for Arcane Essence, Arcane Salvage, Blank Runes

- Create-based recipes that are the same, but done with create: Inscribed runes, Upgrade Orbs.

 

Future plans for the mod:

- New spell groups

- New spells for existing spell groups

- New armors

- New tiers for existing gear
